.github/workflows/maven.yml.general_idea: Update the GitHub Actions workflow to use JDK 21 instead of JDK 17 for the build environment.

src/main/java/by/andd3dfx/templateapp/ex.general_idea: Replace String.format with the String.formatted method introduced in Java 15 for cleaner string interpolation.
src/main/java/by/andd3dfx/templateapp/ex.before: super(String.format("Could not find %s by id=%d", name, id));
src/main/java/by/andd3dfx/templateapp/ex.after: super("Could not find %s by id=%d".formatted(name, id));

src/main/java/by/andd3dfx/templateapp/pe.general_idea: Remove unused import for single @TypeDef annotation.
Remove explicit TypeDef definitions from @TypeDefs annotation.

src/test/java/by/andd3dfx/templateapp/pe.general_idea: Replace List.get(0) with List.getFirst() to use the new Java 21 convenience method.
